Notice Of Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Mineral Fusion Natural Brands Llc
Off Calendar Apr-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH ADVOCATES, INC. Notice Of Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Mineral Fusion Natural Brands Llc
Appearances (by Zoom):
Jake Schulte, Esq. 619-629-0527 Entoro Law LLP for Plaintiff.
Matt Orr, Esq. 213-933-2330 Amin Talati Wasserman LLP for Defendant Mineral Fusion,
Kevin Osborne, Esq. 415-635-0631 Erickson Kramer Osborne LLP for Intervenor-Obejctor Piyush Yadav
Yve Golan, Esq. 866-298-4150 ext. 101 (Pro Hac Vice forthcoming) The Golan Law Firm PLLC
for Intervenor-Obejctor Piyush Yadav

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Mr. Osborne informs the Court Ms. Golan has a pending pro hac vice application. Hearing no objections, the Court allows Ms. Golan to argue. Ms. Golan argues and contests the tentative ruling. Other counsel responds. After arguments, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH ADVOCATES, INC.'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Mineral Fusion Natural Brands LLC.

Taken Under Submission. Counsel for Plaintiff to submit proposed form of order that is one sided addressing and fixing the problems raised in court today to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After the hearing, an order overruling objections is signed/filed.***

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
